subject: G650 update
body:
Jeffrey,
Our sales rep from Gulfstream Rick Pitner who handles our account  would like 
to either meet with you in St. Thomas,  NYC or via phone to  explain our 
serial number assignment for G650. He mentioned to me that  some of his clients 
are taking a Gulfstream offer for a G550  to deliver in 3rd quarter of 2012 for 
a reduced price under 50M. ..List price at this time is  54M.
below is a small market survey I found on _www.Controller.com_ 
(http://www.Controller.com)  
Rick Pitner contact info: 352-455-4877 cell    352-742-7421 office     email: 
_rick.pitner@gulfstream.com_ (mailto:rick.pitner@gulfstream.com) 
please advise if you would like Rick to contacted  you?
Larry V.
 
cc: D.K.I. esq
